title: OCP Consensus Vote Payload
description: Payload for a consensus_vote message. Each eligible agent submits one signed vote per round.

consensus_id.description: The consensus round being voted on.

vote.description: The selected option. MUST be one of the options defined in the initiation.

rationale_hash.description: SHA-3-256 hash of the voter's private rationale (for auditability without disclosure).

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over SHA-3-256(consensus_id || voter_id || vote || confidence).
